vlan_preview:
Using policies: /tmp/policies-filter-frz0reh5.json
# SEGMENT iot -> VLAN 100 iface wlp2s0.100
sudo ip link add link wlp2s0 name wlp2s0.100 type vlan id 100
sudo ip link set dev wlp2s0.100 up
sudo ip link add name br-iot type bridge || true
sudo ip link set dev br-iot up
sudo ip link set dev wlp2s0.100 master br-iot
# SEGMENT guest -> VLAN 200 iface wlp2s0.200
sudo ip link add link wlp2s0 name wlp2s0.200 type vlan id 200
sudo ip link set dev wlp2s0.200 up
sudo ip link add name br-guest type bridge || true
sudo ip link set dev br-guest up
sudo ip link set dev wlp2s0.200 master br-guest
Done. If you used --apply, VLAN interfaces/bridges were created.
